question_text: From the wave diagram shown below of a sound wave, identify the property labelled at marker M.

answer_key.explanation: Marker M spans one full compression-to-compression distance, which is the wavelength.
answer_key.related_concept: Properties of a longitudinal sound wave

visual.caption: Sound wave with property marker.
visual.altText: A longitudinal wave sketch with one labelled marker spanning the distance between two consecutive compressions.
